'''âl-t-l-h''' ('''kalatlehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunoreact|immunoreact]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunoreact|immunoreact]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-t-l-h
|-
! Lemma
| kalatlehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilatlehoko|thilatlehoko]] || [[word:jilatlehoko|jilatlehoko]] || [[word:shilatlehoko|shilatlehoko]] || [[word:kilatlehoko|kilatlehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulatlehoko|thuthulatlehoko]] || [[word:jujulatlehoko|jujulatlehoko]] || [[word:shushulatlehoko|shushulatlehoko]] || [[word:kukulatlehoko|kukulatlehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulatlehoko|thulatlehoko]] || [[word:julatlehoko|julatlehoko]] || [[word:shulatlehoko|shulatlehoko]] || [[word:kulatlehoko|kulatlehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulatlehoko|thulatlehoko]] || [[word:julatlehoko|julatlehoko]] || [[word:shulatlehoko|shulatlehoko]] || [[word:kulatlehoko|kulatlehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelatlehoko|thelatlehoko]] || [[word:jelatlehoko|jelatlehoko]] || [[word:shelatlehoko|shelatlehoko]] || [[word:kelatlehoko|kelatlehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholatlehoko|thotholatlehoko]] || [[word:jojolatlehoko|jojolatlehoko]] || [[word:shosholatlehoko|shosholatlehoko]] || [[word:kokolatlehoko|kokolatlehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholatlehoko|tholatlehoko]] || [[word:jolatlehoko|jolatlehoko]] || [[word:sholatlehoko|sholatlehoko]] || [[word:kolatlehoko|kolatlehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholatlehoko|tholatlehoko]] || [[word:jolatlehoko|jolatlehoko]] || [[word:sholatlehoko|sholatlehoko]] || [[word:kolatlehoko|kolatlehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlatlehoko|thĂŠlatlehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlatlehoko|jĂŠlatlehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlatlehoko|shĂŠlatlehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlatlehoko|kĂŠlatlehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalatlehoko|thathalatlehoko]] || [[word:jajalatlehoko|jajalatlehoko]] || [[word:shashalatlehoko|shashalatlehoko]] || [[word:kakalatlehoko|kakalatlehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalatlehoko|thalatlehoko]] || [[word:jalatlehoko|jalatlehoko]] || [[word:shalatlehoko|shalatlehoko]] || [[word:kalatlehoko|kalatlehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalatlehoko|thalatlehoko]] || [[word:jalatlehoko|jalatlehoko]] || [[word:shalatlehoko|shalatlehoko]] || [[word:kalatlehoko|kalatlehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalatlehithi|shalatlehithi]] || [[word:shalatlehiji|shalatlehiji]] || [[word:shalatlehishi|shalatlehishi]] || [[word:shalatlehiki|shalatlehiki]]
